steps.title: Identify what they wanted to preserve
steps.content: The decisive clue is what they explicitly want to avoid: “the thorough clerical aspect of the whole might have been somewhat marred.” This reveals they made deliberate choices to preserve the appropriate appearance for a clerical residence.

steps.title: Match the preserved appearance to intentional appropriateness
steps.content:
The passage explains the furnishings were selected to maintain the “clerical aspect”—the appropriate look for a clergyperson's home.

Choice B directly captures this: the rooms were “furnished with the intention of maintaining a sense of appropriateness.” The other three either contradict the passage's explanation or focus on unrelated concerns like practicality or aesthetic criticism.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
